privacyVerify.loadingDescription: Please wait while we verify your privacy request
privacyVerify.successDescriptionExport: Your data export request has been confirmed and is being processed
privacyVerify.successDescriptionDeletion: Your account deletion request has been confirmed
privacyVerify.errorDescription: We couldn't verify your privacy request
privacyVerify.exportStep1: We're generating your data export (typically takes less than 5 minutes)
privacyVerify.exportStep2: You'll receive an email with a download link when it's ready
privacyVerify.exportStep3: The download link will be valid for 7 days
privacyVerify.deletionDescription: Your account and data are being permanently deleted. You'll receive a confirmation email when the process is complete.
privacyVerify.linkExpired: The verification link may have expired (valid for 24 hours)
privacyVerify.linkUsed: The link may have already been used
privacyVerify.linkInvalid: The link may be invalid or corrupted

privacyDownload.loadingDescription: Please wait while we prepare your data export
privacyDownload.readyDescription: Your personal data export is ready to download
privacyDownload.downloadedDescription: Your personal data has been downloaded successfully
privacyDownload.errorDescription: We couldn't download your data export
privacyDownload.exportReadyDescription: Click the button below to download your personal data export.
privacyDownload.downloadCompleteDescription: Your data export has been downloaded successfully.
privacyDownload.nextStep1: Extract and review your data in the downloaded ZIP file
privacyDownload.nextStep2: Store the file securely as it contains personal information
privacyDownload.nextStep3: This download link will expire in 7 days
privacyDownload.linkExpired: The download link may have expired (valid for 7 days)
privacyDownload.tokenInvalid: The download token may be invalid
privacyDownload.exportDeleted: The export may have been deleted
